scripts.ingest: node node_modules/@wutangbanger/horus-insight-store/dist/ingest.js --file reports/unit-results.json --layer unit && node node_modules/@wutangbanger/horus-insight-store/dist/ingest.js --file reports/integration-results.json --layer integration
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run ingest && pnpm run test:contract && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:coverage: mkdir -p reports && vitest run tests/unit tests/integration --coverage --reporter=json --outputFile=reports/unit-results.json
scripts.dashboard:full: pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run dashboard:generate
scripts.agents:felix: tsx agents/run-agent.ts felix "$(cat reports/unit-results.json reports/integration-results.json 2>/dev/null | jq -sc '.')"
scripts.agents:greta: pnpm run flakiness:analyze && tsx agents/run-agent.ts greta "$(cat reports/flakiness-report.json)"
scripts.agents:tessa: tsx agents/run-agent.ts tessa "$(cat reports/coverage/coverage-summary.json reports/unit-results.json reports/integration-results.json 2>/dev/null | jq -sc '.')"
scripts.agents:horus-felix: tsx agents/build-horus-inputs.ts felix > /tmp/horus-felix-input.json && tsx agents/run-horus-agent.ts horus-felix --input-file /tmp/horus-felix-input.json
scripts.agents:horus-greta: tsx agents/build-horus-inputs.ts greta > /tmp/horus-greta-input.json && tsx agents/run-horus-agent.ts horus-greta --input-file /tmp/horus-greta-input.json
scripts.agents:horus-iris: pnpm run ingest && tsx agents/build-horus-inputs.ts iris > /tmp/horus-iris-input.json && tsx agents/run-horus-agent.ts horus-iris --input-file /tmp/horus-iris-input.json
scripts.agents:horus-percy: tsx agents/build-horus-inputs.ts percy > /tmp/horus-percy-input.json && tsx agents/run-horus-agent.ts horus-percy --input-file /tmp/horus-percy-input.json
scripts.agents:horus-kurt: tsx agents/build-horus-inputs.ts kurt > /tmp/horus-kurt-input.json && tsx agents/run-horus-agent.ts horus-kurt --input-file /tmp/horus-kurt-input.json
